channel.title: en on Edson Celio
channel.description: Recent content in en on Edson Celio

item.title: Day 01 - Deploying an Ruby App from Gitlab to Heroku
item.description: Problem Deploy an ruby application hosted in Gitlab to Heroku, using Gitlab CI/CD. Solution Configurating Heroku account Heroku is a PaaS with support to several programmming languages.

item.title: 30 Days of Devops
item.description: Objectives For 30 days, write articles with problem solving in real scenarios using DevOps culture concepts/tools. Rules Title format: day<day number>-<article title> All codes used to resolve the issues will be made available in https://github.
